introSection: OCT Thrust SSC1000 is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Hongshan, Wuhan, Hubei, China. It is a mirror image of Bullet Coaster at the Happy Valley in Shenzhen.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
OCT Thrust SSC1000 is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Hongshan, Wuhan, Hubei, China. It is a mirror image of Bullet Coaster at the Happy Valley in Shenzhen.



6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
